creator: jon@xyinn.org
text: It existed throughout all of the 13.X releases I've used on this machine, I haven't tried 12.X on it. But I think I'm good on calling it quits on this one, it's getting close to the half a year mark and I don't want to keep putting more energy into this. Thanks for helping debugging this John, I really appreciated it. Hopefully this ticket can be resolved eventually for some future people. I'll see what I'll do about continued FreeBSD usage on my desktops/laptops.
